Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 152 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 123 upvotes, 10 comments
  3. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 94 upvotes, 10 comments
  4. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 36 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 265 upvotes, 49 comments
  6. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 715 upvotes, 152 comments
  7. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 41 upvotes, 4 comments
  8. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 73 upvotes, 12 comments
  10. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 139 upvotes, 28 comments
  11. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 41 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 589 upvotes, 177 comments
  13. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 270 upvotes, 76 comments
  14. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 180 upvotes, 48 comments
  15. Modern Generic SVGA driver for Windows 3.1 31 upvotes, 5 comments
  16. Components of a Coding Agent 232 upvotes, 73 comments
  17. Advice to young people, the lies I tell myself (2024) 99 upvotes, 27 comments
  18. Nvim-treesitter (13K+ Stars) is Archived 110 upvotes, 31 comments
  19. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 143 upvotes, 45 comments
  20. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 424 upvotes, 187 comments
  21. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 26 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Aegis – open-source FPGA silicon 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  23. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 618 upvotes, 298 comments
  24. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 61 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 156 upvotes, 78 comments
  26. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 22 upvotes, 7 comments
  27. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 225 upvotes, 147 comments
  28. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 142 upvotes, 88 comments
  29. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 85 upvotes, 74 comments
  30. Software never had a soul 12 upvotes, 8 comments

Last generated 5:00pm, 5 April 2026. Source here.
